next_action: Collect verified payment for the authorized $950 Fix Sprint.
operator_action_recommendations: Confirm the merchant is still aligned to the active ShopiFixer offer.
Monitor for Stripe checkout.session.completed on the authorized offer.
Verify the paid state lands in client registry truth.
Confirm the fulfillment truth rebuild advances to payment_received.
Do not start fulfillment until payment is verified.

stages.name: Audit Complete
stages.completion_condition: Audit surface exists and contains a scored merchant problem statement plus recommendation.

stages.name: Conversion Brief Generated
stages.source_field: store_domain, audit_score, benchmark_summary, top_issue, fix_recommendation, sprint_price
stages.completion_condition: Conversion brief exists for the same merchant and carries the $950 Fix Sprint authority.

stages.name: Offer Sent
stages.completion_condition: Offer outcome authority records offer_sent for the active merchant.

stages.name: Payment Received
stages.completion_condition: Client registry and fulfillment truth both reflect verified paid ShopiFixer truth for the same merchant.

stages.name: Fulfillment Started
stages.completion_condition: Fulfillment truth changes execution_status from not_started to in_progress or equivalent paid-delivery state.

stages.name: Proof Package Complete
stages.completion_condition: Before evidence, after evidence, and merchant-facing proof package are present in fulfillment truth.

stages.name: Completed
stages.completion_condition: Fulfillment truth records completed delivery and no further proof/work is required.

lane_behavior: Blocked stage renders as visually blocked until payment truth arrives.
Pending stages render as muted future steps.
